# Router-name: bilibili_video_reply  
**Commit time:** 2026.07.19  
**Cookies?:** yes (bilibili.com 需包含 SESSDATA) / 未测试  
**Author:** AI转写 / huinyg审核 - 来源于RSShub@Qixingchen  
**Introduction:** bilibili 视频评论  
**Address:** rssust://bilibili_video_reply  
**Example:** [rssust://bilibili_video_reply?bvid=BV1vA411b7ip](/bilibili_video_reply?bvid=BV1vA411b7ip)  
**Parameter:**  
1. **bvid**  
   Type of parameter: string  
   Default value: null  
   Meaning: 可在视频页 URL 中找到
